name: Wand of Wonder
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge while choosing a point within 120 feet of yourself.

activation.effect: Roll on Wand of Wonder Effects table

properties.spell_range_extension: Spells with max range less than 120 feet become 120 feet
properties.multiple_targets: DM determines randomly if effect has multiple subjects

regaining_charges.on_roll_1: Wand crumbles into dust and is destroyed

effects_table.01-20: Cast spell from chosen point. Roll 1d10: 1-2 Darkness, 3-4 Faerie Fire, 5-6 Fireball, 7-8 Slow, 9-10 Stinking Cloud
effects_table.21-25: Nothing happens. You have Stunned condition until next turn
effects_table.26-30: Cast Gust of Wind. Line extends from you to chosen point
effects_table.31-35: Nothing happens. You take 1d6 Psychic damage
effects_table.36-40: Heavy rain for 1 minute in 120-foot-high, 60-foot-radius Cylinder
effects_table.41-45: 600 oversized butterflies fill 60-foot-high, 30-foot-radius Cylinder for 10 minutes
effects_table.46-50: Cast Lightning Bolt. Line extends from you to chosen point
effects_table.51-55: Creature closest to chosen point is enlarged. If not you and can't be affected, you become target
effects_table.56-60: Magically formed creature appears. Roll 1d4: 1 Rhinoceros, 2 Elephant, 3-4 Rat. Disappears after 1 hour or at 0 HP
effects_table.61-64: Grass covers 60-foot-radius circle. Existing grass grows to 10x size for 1 minute
effects_table.65-68: Object disappears into Ethereal Plane. Must be unattended, within 120 feet, no larger than 10 feet
effects_table.69-72: Nothing happens. You shrink as if Enlarge/Reduce for 1 minute
effects_table.73-77: Leaves grow from nearest creature. Turn brown and fall after 24 hours unless picked
effects_table.78-82: Nothing happens. Burst of light extends from you 30 feet. DC 15 Constitution save or Blinded 1 minute
effects_table.83-87: Nothing happens. You cast Invisibility on yourself
effects_table.88-92: Stream of 1d4 × 10 gems shoots from wand in Line 30 feet long, 5 feet wide. 1 Bludgeoning damage each, divided equally
effects_table.93-97: Cast Polymorph on creature closest to point. Roll 1d4: 1 Black Bear, 2 Giant Wasp, 3-4 Frog
effects_table.98-00: Creature closest to point makes DC 15 Constitution save. On failure Restrained and turning to stone, repeat save next turn. On success petrified
